content.en:
"Void Heaven Diagram, I must understand it thoroughly!"

Ye Tian muttered.

These days, he rarely comprehended the Void Heaven Diagram, but he also comprehended the Void Heaven Diagram to the extent of thirty percent, which was completely the benefit of Ye Tian's god-level extreme transcendence talent.

Otherwise, it would definitely take him a long time to comprehend thirty percent of the Void Heaven Diagram, and he would even fall into a bottleneck, and he would never be able to comprehend to this extent.

And when Ye Tian comprehended the Void Heaven Diagram, the outside world also caused a small sensation because of Ye Tian.

Because Ye Tian once again entered the list of god generals, he is currently ranked 662nd on the list of god generals.

This ranking is indeed not high, but Ye Tian is a native creature of the Great Universe, and he is the only local god general who has entered the god general list, how high his potential is!

This incident even shocked many of the Void Heaven Temple's god generals, at first most of them didn't respect this little master ancestor very much, but now this little master ancestor has become a six-star mid-stage god general, and ranks first among the six-star mid-stage god generals.

That's right, the gods and generals before Ye Tian's ranking were all six-star late-stage god generals, and he was the first six-star mid-stage god general.

If he was promoted at this rate, wouldn't Ye Tian soon be able to become a seven-star god general?

However, the ranking of the god general list does not really reflect a person's combat power, the god general list is only ranked according to attack power, defense and various secret techniques, and what level of strength it reaches is what ranking.

A high ranking does not mean that it is strong, so some strong people restrain each other, and some people have hole card secret arts, which are not counted.

For example, some six-star mid-stage god generals, if they break out, their strength will skyrocket, and they can even kill the six-star late god generals.

In the eyes of other god generals, Ye Tian's strength has improved so quickly, his foundation is definitely not strong, his real combat power is not lasting at all, and he may not even be able to defeat the powerful six-star early stage god generals.

But Ye Tian didn't comment in the accident world, and he wholeheartedly comprehended the Void Heaven Diagram, and he didn't even go to the few chances of his birth.

The god-level extreme transcendence talent is too rebellious, plus Ye Tian's own comprehension is also relatively high, plus some elixirs to improve his comprehension, etc., Ye Tian's progress in comprehending the Void Heaven Diagram is very fast.

The only pity is that there is no way to use the time acceleration of the Void Heaven Diagram, otherwise it will be countless times easier.

With Ye Tian's natural comprehension speed, at the beginning, 100 years can increase the progress by 1%, but after the comprehension reaches 40% progress, it will take 1000 years to increase the progress of 1%.

In the blink of an eye, 60,000 years have passed.

At this time, the entire universe was developing extremely rapidly, and many new Heavenly Monarchs were born, while the number of Divine Generals did not increase much, and even decreased to a certain extent.

This is because the birth of the Divine General is difficult in itself, and the good cultivation environment of the Great Universe does not mean that it is easy to impact the combat power of the Divine General.

The major forces have given birth to many god generals, but the fall speed of the god generals is also very fast, there are too many opportunities in the big universe, and every time the fate is born, it attracts many god generals to compete, and some one-star god generals can't compete with those six or seven star god generals at all, so they fall and die one by one.

Even the six or seven star gods have fallen and died, and the losses are heavy.

And in the meantime, there are also many gods who will dazzle the entire universe.

One of them is the Yunzi Divine Maiden, whose strength has improved extremely fast, and has reached the combat power of the seven-star god general, and is even about to reach the mid-stage seven-star god general, ranking 52nd on the god general list.

With the other party's cultivation speed, he is expected to rank first on the list of god generals in the future.

And Ye Tian has long been unpopular, because his ranking has fallen a few times instead of rising, this is still the case where many gods will fall, if the gods in front of him do not fall, his ranking is estimated to have fallen even more.

Many of the gods of the Void Heaven Temple even thought that Ye Tian's potential had reached the limit, otherwise what if his strength didn't increase in sixty thousand years?

In the environment of the Great Universe, cultivation has become easy, the strength of a true genius has increased very quickly, and Ye Tian's strength has not increased, so there is no potential.

Even Peng Yu Tianjun, when he mentioned Ye Tian, he sighed again and again.

However, no one knew that Ye Tian's real cultivation time had all been given up, and every minute and every second was contemplating the Void Heaven Diagram, otherwise how could his strength not improve?

Ye Tian deeply understood what his goal was, even if he became a six-star late stage or seven-star god general, could he become a personal disciple of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor?

No!

There are many seven-star gods in the chaos, and even eight-star gods.

However, there are very few personal disciples of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, from the distant era to the present, there are only seventy-one personal disciples, of which some have fallen, and only fifty-three personal disciples remain.

Among them, these personal disciples are all famous and chaotic.

It can be seen from this that the requirements for the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor to select his own disciples are so high.

If he can become a personal disciple of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, what are the six-star god generals and seven-star god generals?

"The Void Sky Diagram has reached 97%!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Originally, the difficulty of enlightenment should be higher and higher at the end, but 30,000 years ago, he suddenly found that his soul had become extremely condensed, and his comprehension instantly skyrocketed.

This is the skyrocketing of basic comprehension, and then after the blessing of transcendent comprehension talent, the comprehension has been raised to an extremely ungodly level.

Because of this, he was able to comprehend the Void Heaven Diagram to 97% in such a short period of time.

After the Void Heaven Diagram realized it, it was able to refine the soul and cause the soul to transform, which was a situation that he didn't understand at first.

Maybe many people in the Void Heaven Temple don't know, but the people who really know must be the personal disciples, and those personal disciples are unlikely to reveal the news.

After all, in the eyes of the rest of the Void Heaven Palace, the Void Heaven Diagram was useless at all, and it was a waste of time to spend a long time contemplating it.

And when you reach the realm of the Mandate of Heaven, you can't comprehend the Void Heaven Diagram, which leads to the secret of the Void Heaven Diagram that no one knows.

In addition, Ye Tian felt that the effect of refining the soul of the Void Heaven Diagram was only incidental, and the real use of the Void Heaven Diagram should be the physical body, and it was the overall physical body.

As for what the use is, Ye Tian is afraid that he can only comprehend the Void Heaven Diagram to one hundred percent, then it is possible to know.

"The last 3% is the hardest to understand, but in 5,000 years at most, I can understand it thoroughly!"

Ye Tian said with confidence.

In order to fully comprehend the Void Heaven Diagram, Ye Tian even recovered the third and fourth Buddha-figures, so as not to be unable to comprehend the last step of the Void Heaven Diagram due to soul problems.

And at this moment, the ancestral monument conveyed a message.

"After 10,000 years, the ancestral monument space will be opened!"

Ye Tian didn't understand the ancestral tablet space, but he quickly learned about the mystery of the ancestral tablet space from the other disciples of the Void Heaven Palace.

It turns out that the ancestral monument space is a place where you can have a chance, once you enter the ancestral monument space, there is endless vitality, endless power of rules, and endless perception......

In short, once you enter the ancestral monument space to comprehend and cultivate, your strength will improve quickly.

Some seven-star peak god generals are waiting for the ancestral monument space to attack the eight-star god generals.

And those who can enter the ancestral monument space are not all the gods and generals, but only the top 100 gods and generals are qualified.

Strictly speaking, a god like Ye Tian would not be able to enter the ancestral monument space at all.

However, if a god general like Ye Tian defeats the top 100 god generals on the god general list, even if he is defeated by special methods, his actual combat power is not enough to reach the top 100, then he will be considered to be in the top 100.

Therefore, in these 10,000 years, the gods who are very close to the top 100 will definitely be very crazy.

The other gods will have to wait for the next chance.
